notes: Running head matches. Multiple right-margin line numbers (4, 6, 7, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13) leaked into the body transcription. Main substantive body error is ἐμφυτευομένην for printed ἐπιφυτευομένην, and ἠρέθειν for printed ὑπερείδειν. Apparatus has several siglum omissions and one missing V support.
